form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months ran last of 8 at Ascot Rtg 72+ on April 1 over 1600m, slow going 6 len behind King Hit carrying 54kg at $101. Previously second-up second last of 12 at Belmont Park Rtg 66+ on September 20 over 1650m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Decision Maker carrying 58kg at $101. Rates highly and should do much better.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 2nd of 10 at Albany Rtg 58+ on March 26 over 1500m, on a slow track; 0.9 len behind Makin Prophets with 56.5kg at $5.50. Before that 2nd of 11 at Albany Rtg 58+ C&G on March 8 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.1 len behind Makin Prophets carrying 56kg at $7.50. Shapes as a key runner.

The start before that 8th of 11 at Pinjarra Grad Hcp 60+ on February 14 over 2000m, 6 len behind All Grunt carrying 53kg at $31. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming 6th of 9 at York on March 2 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Marines Cry with 61kg at $17. Second run from a spell 4th of 10 at Pinjarra Cl5 on March 22 over 1600m, 0.5 len behind Gage Roads with 54kg at $101. Looks ready to win.

form.formComment: Last start ran last of 9 at York on March 15 over 1500m, 6 len behind Rommel's Jeuney carrying 59kg at $12. The run before that 7th of 11 at York on March 2 over 1920m, 3 len behind Angel Shame carrying 59.5kg at $3.90. Tough to beat if near his best.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last outing 6th of 8 at Ascot Cl3 on April 3 over 1200m, 6 len behind Tribal Ruler carrying 54kg at $26. At only start last preparation 2nd of 8 at Mendooran Cl2 on September 6 over 1500m, head behind Akauwheo with 54kg at $4.20. Is a second up winner in the past but this looks a bit rich.
